batch_rules: Do not redesign existing faction emblems.
Grey Wall Army has no formal badge; do not invent a Grey Wall logo, shoulder patch, crest, banner, or rank plaque.
The locked Zhaoming emblem may appear only as an almost-erased pressure mark on inherited old armor, hidden inside or along the edge of a plate.
The pressure mark must be extremely worn by snow, rust, blade scratches, and age; it must not read as a clean complete badge.
Xue Linqiang must read as a weather-bent old wall soldier around 50, not a palace general, imperial commander, or immortal martial master.
Preserve broad but bent shoulders, frost-cracked hands, wind-cracked face, old scar, bone whistle, worn long spear, coarse hemp wall scarf, old iron buckles, and snowline leg wraps.
Clothing can be repaired, old, cold, and hard-worn, but not ragged, filthy, or visually homeless.
Use low magic only as body discipline and impact memory; no spell circle, aura, or glowing martial power display.
No visible text, labels, captions, UI, watermark, Chinese characters, or Latin letters inside generated images.
